# claude-checkup (claudecowork.co.kr)

> A verified catalog of Claude Code skills with honest install commands, a free environment checkup (scanner), and beginner guides — in 16 languages. Built for people who are new to Claude or struggling with it. Korean-first.

## For AI agents (recommended entry points)

- Remote MCP server (Streamable HTTP, read-only, no auth):
  `claude mcp add --transport http checkup-skills https://claudecowork.co.kr/api/mcp`
  Tools: `search_skills` (query the catalog), `skill_info` (details + sample prompts), `install_skill` (returns install commands for verified skills only — refuses to fabricate), `whats_new` (recently added skills).
- Full catalog (JSON): https://claudecowork.co.kr/catalog.json
- Recently added skills (JSON): https://claudecowork.co.kr/whats-new.json
- Recently added skills (RSS 2.0): https://claudecowork.co.kr/whats-new.xml

## Pages

- Catalog (search & filter, per-skill sample prompts): https://claudecowork.co.kr/ko/catalog
- Beginner guide (setup, /commands, MCP one-line connect): https://claudecowork.co.kr/ko/guide
- Environment checkup / scanner (score, radar, recommendations): https://claudecowork.co.kr/ko
- Source policy (how provenance is verified): https://claudecowork.co.kr/ko/source-policy
- Pricing: https://claudecowork.co.kr/ko/pricing

Locales: replace the `/ko/` path prefix with any of
ko, en, ja, zh-CN, zh-TW, es, fr, de, pt, ru, hi, id, vi, th, tr, ar (RTL supported).
Prefix-less requests are auto-redirected by Accept-Language.

## Honesty policy (why agents can trust install commands)

An install command is shown only when the skill's existence is confirmed in its
source repository's git tree, or when it is hosted in our own public marketplace
(`x77xdavid-prog/checkup-skills`, installable via `/plugin marketplace add`).
Skills without a verified public install path are labeled unverified and expose
no fabricated commands — `install_skill` returns alternatives instead. Counts
per verification tier are visible live in the catalog; they are enforced by a
build gate rather than hardcoded here.
